implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Registers the task router, which exposes the /tasks endpoint for adding new tasks.
implementation.name: app.include_router(task_router)
implementation.pseudo_code:
Initialize FastAPI app
Include the task_router, which contains the /tasks POST endpoint

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Defines the POST /tasks endpoint that receives task details and delegates creation to the service layer.
implementation.name: create_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
When a POST request is made to /tasks with TaskCreate payload:
    TRY
        Call task_service.create_task(task)
        RETURN created Task
    EXCEPT Exception as e
        Raise HTTP 400 with error message

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Handles business logic for creating a task and delegates persistence to the repository.
implementation.name: TaskService.create_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
Log creation attempt with user_name
Call repository.add_task(task_data)
Return the created Task

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Persists the new task by adding it to the in-memory list and saving to the JSON file.
implementation.name: TaskRepository.add_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
Create Task object with new ID and provided data
Append Task to internal list
Increment ID counter
Save all tasks to JSON file
Log creation
Return the created Task
